testcase.name: Forgot Password › @smoke is reachable from login and can navigate back
Forgot Password › enables reset initiation only after a valid email is entered
Forgot Password › @smoke blocks password recovery behind the CAPTCHA challenge
Login › @smoke exposes the public sign-in shell
Login › enables submission only after the required credentials are provided
Login › @smoke blocks login behind the CAPTCHA challenge
Registration › @smoke shows the first-step registration form and return path to login
Registration › keeps the Next action disabled until valid credentials and terms acceptance are present
Registration › @smoke gates registration continuation behind the CAPTCHA challenge
Public fallback route › @smoke keeps the 404 shell functional
Protected routes › redirects / to login with the original target preserved
Protected routes › redirects /explore to login with the original target preserved
Protected routes › redirects /wallet to login with the original target preserved
Protected routes › redirects /price/LTC to login with the original target preserved
Forgot Password › @smoke is reachable from login and can navigate back
Forgot Password › enables reset initiation only after a valid email is entered
